items.label: Site description
items.value: Synthetic example demonstrating UGR failure mode when room_type=drawing_office tightens the UGR limit to 16 per BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3 row 5.34. 12×9 m drawing office; 24 LED_PANEL_600 panels in uniform 4×6 grid. achieved_avg 750 lux PASS; U₀ 0.78 PASS; max UGR 17.5 FAIL (> 16 drawing-office limit). INV-03 FAIL HIGH; INV-01 + INV-02 + INV-04..09 PASS. Engineering signal: substitute UGR-class-rated luminaires (UGR ≤ 16) with batwing or asymmetric distribution suitable for drawing-office work.

value._source: Synthetic 600x600mm recessed LED panel, 6000lm, 4000K, opal diffuser. General-office UGR-class panel. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3 — generated by scripts/generate_reference_ies.py. Used to demonstrate per-room-type UGR mismatch detection in drawing-office context.
